# Rolling a Dice 
🔹 Steps:
Start
Import random module
Ask user: “Do you want to roll the dice? (y/n)”
If user enters 'y':
Generate random number between 1 and 6
Print the number
Repeat from step 3
Else if user enters 'n':
Print “Thanks for playing”
End

# Fliping a Coin
  🔹 Steps:
Start
Import random module
Ask user: “Flip the coin? (y/n)”
If user enters 'y':
Randomly choose Heads or Tails
Print result
Repeat
If user enters 'n':
Print “Game ended”
End
